scope: current absence of off-site backup storage
findings: The current platform has local PBS storage and a nightly VM backup job for 110,120,130,140,150.
backup-lv3 includes the dedicated 640G datastore disk and remains the correct recovery anchor VM.
No PBS remotes or PBS sync jobs are configured on backup-lv3.
No off-site Proxmox storage is currently configured, so the total-host-loss recovery path remains repo-managed but not yet applied live.
